analysis_plan.purpose: Bias point, output common-mode, output balance, current and power.
Small differential DC transfer around zero VID and local differential gain.
Differential gain, bandwidth, unity-gain frequency and phase diagnostic.
Small differential step response around solved input common-mode.

validity_checks: AC and transient must use solved VIN_CM/VBP/ITAIL from S10 or S18.
Transient is invalid if output is pinned near rail or VID is not centered around solved OP.
